exploration_notes: Traced RouteConfiguration through 3 repos. Step 1: Istio's httproute.go (line 55) defines BuildHTTPRoutes which dispatches to buildSidecarOutboundHTTPRouteConfig (line 136) and gateway.go's buildGatewayHTTPRouteConfig (line 373). These functions construct &route.RouteConfiguration{} objects (e.g., lines 81, 124, 194 in httproute.go). The type is imported from go-control-plane at line 24. Step 2: go-control-plane's route.pb.go (line 29) contains the generated Go struct 'type RouteConfiguration st
